# `unity analytics` command reference

Generated from Unity CLI `1.0.0-beta.2` help output.

Installed help is authoritative; this file is a versioned snapshot.

## unity analytics

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: linux, macos, windows
- Aliases: None

Manage analytics and telemetry consent

### Usage

`unity analytics [options] [command]`

### Subcommands

| Name | Aliases | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `opt-in` | ‚Äî | Enable anonymous usage data collection |
| `opt-out` | ‚Äî | Disable anonymous usage data collection |
| `status` | ‚Äî | Show current analytics consent status |

### Positional arguments

None.

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h`, `--help` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | ‚Äî | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | ‚Äî | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | ‚Äî | False | False | ‚Äî | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `UNITY_FORMAT` | Mirrors --format. |
| `UNITY_NO_BANNER` | Mirrors --no-banner. |
| `UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE` | Mirrors --non-interactive. |
| `UNITY_QUIET` | Mirrors --quiet. |
| `UNITY_VERBOSE` | Mirrors --verbose. |
| `UNITY_PROXY` | Mirrors --proxy. |
| `UNITY_LOG_PROXY` | Mirrors --log-proxy. |

### Examples exposed by help

None.

### Exit codes

None.

Confirm behavior with `unity analytics --help` on the target machine before execution.
